column1: # THE LONG NIGHT — sound table (the space pivot, design.md §15.4)
# Owner: Jane. John: parse this, don't hardcode a path. See src/data/audio.ts.
# Tab-separated. Lines starting with # are comments. Blank lines ignored.
# id      the fixed event strings World/App already push (game/world.ts
#         playSfx calls, game/app.ts startMusic): hit, kill, hurt, death,
#         revive, win, boss_phase, pickup, gold, heal, evolve, chest,
#         levelup, music/theme. An id with no row here is silent — never a
#         bug. A row with no matching id is just inert.
# path    relative to `assets/`. ALWAYS under `space/audio/` (tracked,
#         curated) — never `space-assets/` (gitignored vendor drop). See the
#         same note in images.tsv.
# volume  0..1. Kept low on anything that can fire dozens of times a second
#         at 220-enemy density (hit/pickup) so it beds under the music
#         instead of turning into white noise; kept high on anything that
#         fires once (win/death/evolve).
# loop    1 for music beds, blank for one-shots.
# One track for `music/theme` for now — WebAudioSink (john.md) plays one
# active loop per id and App only ever calls play('music/theme') once per
# run start. An intensity-reactive swap (calm -> DynamicFight_* as the
# spawn director's target population climbs, design.md §15.4) needs a
# second music id and a call site in world.ts/app.ts that doesn't exist
# yet — that's a code ask, tracked in todo.md, not something this table can
# do alone. DynamicFight_1/2/3, dark/dark2 and DubStepDropBoom are already
# curated into space/audio/ waiting for that hook.
# id
hit
kill
hurt
death
revive
win
boss_phase
pickup
gold
heal
evolve
chest
levelup
music/theme
